raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint addresses an unresolved dispute regarding an unauthorized charge on my American Express account ending in XXXX. In XX/XX/XXXX, an unauthorized charge appeared on this account, which was not visible in my online account management nor linked to any physical card in my possession. I did not receive any account statements by mail during this time, making me unaware of the charge until XX/XX/XXXX, when I received a past-due payment notice. Despite filing a dispute with American Express in XXXX under Reference Number XXXX, I have not received a resolution. 

Attempts to follow up in XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX resulted in the reopening of the dispute under Reference Number XXXX, but no further updates have been provided. Additionally, XXXX XXXX contacted me in XX/XX/XXXX regarding the account, to which I responded with evidence of the ongoing dispute, yet no resolution followed. I have also been unable to access the account or dispute status through XXXX XXXX online portal. 

This situation has led to the balance ballooning to {$820.00} due to late fees and interest on the unauthorized charge. It has significantly impacted my credit score and caused considerable stress. I request immediate resolution of the dispute, removal of all late fees and interest, and corrections to my credit report.
